notifyPumpOn.title: Notify when pump starts
notifyPumpOn.description: Adds a 'Pump Started' motion sensor that briefly triggers each time the pump turns on. Enable notifications for it in the Home app.

notifyPumpOff.title: Notify when pump stops
notifyPumpOff.description: Adds a 'Pump Stopped' motion sensor that briefly triggers each time the pump turns off. Enable notifications for it in the Home app.
